title: Software Engineer
description: Designs, develops, tests, and maintains software applications and systems. Works across the full software development lifecycle from requirements gathering to deployment and maintenance.
personality_fit: Analytical, detail-oriented, enjoys solving complex problems, persistent, comfortable with abstract thinking, likes building things from scratch
roadmap: Learn programming fundamentals (Python, JavaScript, or Java)
Master data structures and algorithms
Learn version control with Git
Build 3-5 real projects (web apps, CLI tools)
Study system design basics
Practice coding interviews on LeetCode/HackerRank
Apply for internships or entry-level roles

title: Data Scientist
description: Extracts insights from structured and unstructured data using statistics, machine learning, and data visualization. Helps organizations make data-driven decisions.
personality_fit: Curious, loves finding patterns in data, comfortable with ambiguity, strong mathematical intuition, enjoys storytelling with numbers
roadmap: Learn Python and SQL fundamentals
Study statistics and probability
Learn data manipulation with Pandas and NumPy
Master data visualization (Matplotlib, Seaborn, Tableau)
Study machine learning algorithms (scikit-learn)
Build 3-5 data analysis projects with real datasets
Learn deep learning basics (TensorFlow/PyTorch)
Create a portfolio on Kaggle

title: UX/UI Designer
description: Creates intuitive, accessible, and visually appealing user interfaces and experiences. Conducts user research, creates wireframes and prototypes, and works closely with developers.
personality_fit: Empathetic, creative, user-centric thinker, good communicator, detail-oriented with aesthetics, enjoys understanding human behavior
roadmap: Learn design fundamentals (color theory, typography, layout)
Master Figma or Adobe XD
Study UX research methods (interviews, surveys, usability testing)
Learn information architecture and user flows
Build 5+ case studies with real or concept projects
Study accessibility standards (WCAG)
Create a portfolio website
Apply for junior UX designer roles

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Bridges development and operations by automating infrastructure, CI/CD pipelines, monitoring, and deployment processes. Ensures reliable and scalable software delivery.
personality_fit: Systematic thinker, loves automation, comfortable with command-line tools, enjoys optimizing processes, patient troubleshooter
roadmap: Learn Linux fundamentals and shell scripting
Master Docker containerization
Learn a cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
Study CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
Learn Kubernetes for orchestration
Study Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible)
Set up monitoring (Prometheus, Grafana)
Get a cloud certification (AWS SAA, etc.)

title: Product Manager
description: Defines product vision, strategy, and roadmap. Works at the intersection of business, technology, and design to build products that solve user problems and drive business value.
personality_fit: Big-picture thinker, excellent communicator, decisive, empathetic toward users, comfortable with ambiguity, natural leader
roadmap: Understand product management fundamentals
Learn user research and customer discovery
Study product analytics (Mixpanel, Amplitude)
Practice writing PRDs and user stories
Learn agile/scrum methodologies
Build or manage a side project end-to-end
Network with PMs and join PM communities
Apply for APM programs or junior PM roles

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Protects organizations from cyber threats by monitoring networks, analyzing vulnerabilities, responding to incidents, and implementing security measures.
personality_fit: Vigilant, detail-oriented, ethical mindset, enjoys puzzles and detective work, continuous learner, calm under pressure
roadmap: Learn networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, DNS, firewalls)
Study cybersecurity basics (CIA triad, threat modeling)
Learn Linux and command-line security tools
Practice on CTF platforms (TryHackMe, HackTheBox)
Study for CompTIA Security+ certification
Learn SIEM tools (Splunk, ELK)
Study incident response procedures
Apply for SOC analyst or junior security roles

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Builds and deploys machine learning models and AI systems at scale. Works on training pipelines, model optimization, and integrating AI into production applications.
personality_fit: Mathematically inclined, research-oriented, patient with experimentation, enjoys pushing boundaries of technology, comfortable with failure and iteration
roadmap: Master Python and mathematics (linear algebra, calculus, probability)
Learn machine learning fundamentals (scikit-learn)
Study deep learning (neural networks, CNNs, RNNs, Transformers)
Choose a specialization (NLP, Computer Vision, Reinforcement Learning)
Learn MLOps (model deployment, monitoring, versioning)
Build end-to-end ML projects
Contribute to open-source ML projects
Apply for ML engineer roles
resources: Deep Learning Specialization by Andrew Ng

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Develops both frontend and backend of web applications. Handles everything from user interfaces to server-side logic, databases, and deployment.
personality_fit: Versatile, enjoys variety in work, quick learner, comfortable switching contexts, likes seeing end-to-end results
roadmap: Master HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Learn a frontend framework (React, Vue, or Angular)
Study backend development (Node.js, Express, or Django)
Learn database management (MongoDB, PostgreSQL)
Build REST APIs and understand authentication
Learn deployment (Docker, cloud hosting, CI/CD)
Build 3-5 full-stack projects
Create a portfolio and apply for roles

title: Mobile App Developer
description: Creates applications for iOS and Android platforms. May specialize in native development (Swift/Kotlin) or cross-platform frameworks (React Native, Flutter).
personality_fit: Creative, enjoys building tangible products, user-experience focused, detail-oriented, likes seeing immediate visual results
roadmap: Choose a path: Native (Swift/Kotlin) or Cross-platform (Flutter/React Native)
Learn the chosen framework fundamentals
Study mobile UI/UX patterns and guidelines
Learn state management and navigation
Build 3+ apps with increasing complexity
Learn API integration and local storage
Publish an app to the Play Store or App Store
Build a portfolio and apply for roles

title: Cloud Architect
description: Designs and oversees cloud computing strategies, infrastructure, and solutions. Ensures scalable, secure, and cost-effective cloud deployments for organizations.
personality_fit: Strategic thinker, enjoys designing large-scale systems, good at balancing trade-offs, strong problem-solving skills, big-picture oriented
roadmap: Learn cloud computing fundamentals
Get hands-on with one cloud platform (AWS recommended)
Study networking and security in the cloud
Learn Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, CloudFormation)
Study microservices and serverless architecture
Get certified (AWS Solutions Architect)
Design architecture for real-world scenarios
Gain experience through projects and consulting

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develops decentralized applications (dApps), smart contracts, and blockchain protocols. Works with distributed ledger technology for finance, supply chain, and other domains.
personality_fit: Innovative, interested in decentralization and finance, enjoys working on cutting-edge technology, independent thinker, comfortable with risk
roadmap: Understand blockchain fundamentals and cryptography
Learn Solidity programming for Ethereum
Study smart contract development and testing
Learn web3.js or ethers.js for frontend integration
Build DeFi or NFT projects
Study security and auditing of smart contracts
Contribute to open-source blockchain projects
Apply for blockchain developer roles or freelance

title: Game Developer
description: Creates video games for various platforms including PC, console, and mobile. Involves game design, programming game mechanics, graphics, physics, and audio integration.
personality_fit: Passionate gamer, creative, enjoys bringing ideas to life, patient with complex systems, artistic and technical balance, persistent
roadmap: Choose a game engine (Unity with C# or Unreal with C++)
Learn the engine fundamentals through tutorials
Study game design principles
Build simple 2D games (platformer, puzzle)
Learn 3D game development and physics
Build a polished game and publish it (itch.io, Steam)
Study game optimization and performance
Build a portfolio and apply to game studios

title: Technical Writer
description: Creates clear, concise documentation for technical products including API docs, user guides, tutorials, and knowledge base articles. Bridges the gap between technical teams and users.
personality_fit: Excellent communicator, enjoys simplifying complex topics, detail-oriented, empathetic toward readers, organized, patient
roadmap: Strengthen writing fundamentals
Learn a technical domain (software, APIs, cloud)
Study documentation tools (Markdown, Swagger, GitBook)
Learn the Docs-as-Code approach
Write sample documentation for open-source projects
Build a portfolio of writing samples
Study UX writing principles
Apply for technical writer roles

title: Digital Marketer
description: Promotes products and services through digital channels including SEO, social media, content marketing, email campaigns, and paid advertising. Analyzes data to optimize marketing strategies.
personality_fit: Creative, data-driven, excellent communicator, trend-aware, adaptable, enjoys storytelling, comfortable with experimentation
roadmap: Learn digital marketing fundamentals
Master SEO (on-page, off-page, technical)
Learn content marketing and copywriting
Study social media marketing strategies
Learn Google Analytics and data analysis
Practice paid advertising (Google Ads, Meta Ads)
Build campaigns for real clients or personal projects
Get certified (Google Digital Garage, HubSpot)

title: Business Analyst
description: Analyzes business processes, identifies improvement opportunities, gathers requirements, and translates business needs into technical solutions. Acts as a bridge between stakeholders and tech teams.
personality_fit: Analytical, excellent communicator, organized, enjoys understanding business processes, good at asking the right questions, diplomatic
roadmap: Learn business analysis fundamentals (BABOK)
Study requirements engineering techniques
Learn SQL and data analysis basics
Master documentation and process modeling (BPMN, UML)
Study Agile methodologies
Practice with real business case studies
Get certified (CBAP, PMI-PBA)
Apply for junior BA or associate analyst roles

title: Financial Analyst
description: Evaluates financial data, creates financial models, prepares reports, and provides recommendations for investment decisions. Works in banking, consulting, or corporate finance.
personality_fit: Numbers-oriented, detail-focused, disciplined, enjoys financial markets, good at research, comfortable with high-pressure environments
roadmap: Learn accounting and financial statement analysis
Master Excel for financial modeling
Study corporate finance and valuation methods
Learn financial analysis frameworks (DCF, comparables)
Study for CFA Level 1 or financial certifications
Build financial models for real companies
Learn Python for financial data analysis
Apply for analyst roles in banking or corporate finance

title: Graphic Designer
description: Creates visual content for branding, marketing, web, and print. Works with typography, color, layout, and imagery to communicate messages effectively through design.
personality_fit: Highly creative, visually oriented, appreciates aesthetics, good eye for detail, enjoys expressing ideas visually, open to feedback
roadmap: Learn design principles (composition, color theory, typography)
Master Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop
Study branding and logo design
Learn print and digital design formats
Build a diverse portfolio (10+ projects)
Learn motion graphics basics (After Effects)
Study design trends and stay current
Freelance or apply for junior designer roles

title: Content Creator / YouTuber
description: Creates engaging content for digital platforms like YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, or blogs. Builds an audience, monetizes content, and often becomes a personal brand.
personality_fit: Outgoing or comfortable on camera, creative, consistent, enjoys sharing knowledge, resilient to criticism, entrepreneurial mindset
roadmap: Choose a niche you're passionate about
Learn video production basics (filming, lighting, audio)
Master video editing (Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or CapCut)
Study YouTube/Instagram algorithm and SEO
Create and publish content consistently (2-4 times/week)
Build and engage with your community
Learn monetization strategies (ads, sponsorships, courses)
Scale and diversify your content

title: Data Engineer
description: Designs and builds data pipelines, warehouses, and infrastructure that enables data scientists and analysts to work with clean, reliable data at scale.
personality_fit: Systematic, enjoys building infrastructure, detail-oriented, comfortable with large-scale systems, likes making things efficient and reliable
roadmap: Master SQL and Python fundamentals
Learn data modeling and warehousing concepts
Study ETL/ELT pipeline design
Learn Apache Spark for large-scale data processing
Master a workflow orchestration tool (Airflow, Prefect)
Learn cloud data services (AWS Redshift, BigQuery, Snowflake)
Build end-to-end data pipelines
Get certified and apply for data engineer roles

title: Biotech Researcher
description: Conducts research in biotechnology, genetics, pharmaceuticals, or biomedical sciences. Works in labs developing new drugs, therapies, or biological products.
personality_fit: Intellectually curious, patient, meticulous, enjoys scientific discovery, comfortable with long-term research, strong analytical skills
roadmap: Complete a degree in biology, biotechnology, or related field
Learn laboratory techniques and safety protocols
Study molecular biology and genetics
Learn bioinformatics tools and data analysis
Gain research experience through internships or thesis projects
Publish research or present at conferences
Specialize in an area (genomics, drug discovery, etc.)
Pursue higher education (M.Sc/Ph.D) or industry roles

title: Mechanical Engineer
description: Designs, develops, and tests mechanical devices and systems. Works on everything from small components to large machines, vehicles, and thermal systems.
personality_fit: Hands-on, enjoys building and testing physical things, strong spatial reasoning, analytical, methodical, likes working with machines
roadmap: Complete a degree in mechanical engineering
Master CAD tools (SolidWorks, AutoCAD, CATIA)
Study core subjects (thermodynamics, fluid mechanics, strength of materials)
Learn manufacturing processes and materials
Gain hands-on experience through projects and internships
Learn simulation tools (ANSYS, MATLAB/Simulink)
Specialize (automotive, robotics, HVAC, aerospace)
Apply for design or manufacturing engineer roles

title: Project Manager
description: Plans, executes, and closes projects within scope, time, and budget. Coordinates teams, manages risks, and ensures project deliverables meet stakeholder expectations.
personality_fit: Organized, natural leader, excellent communicator, calm under pressure, decisive, enjoys coordination and bringing order to chaos
roadmap: Learn project management fundamentals (PMBOK)
Study Agile and Scrum methodologies
Learn project management tools (Jira, Asana, MS Project)
Practice risk management and planning
Lead small projects or volunteer initiatives
Get certified (PMP, CSM, or PRINCE2)
Develop leadership and communication skills
Apply for junior PM or scrum master roles

title: Teacher / Online Educator
description: Educates students in academic subjects, professional skills, or specialized topics. Can work in schools, universities, coaching institutes, or create online courses and tutorials.
personality_fit: Patient, passionate about sharing knowledge, empathetic, enjoys mentoring, good communicator, finds fulfillment in others' growth
roadmap: Develop deep expertise in your subject area
Learn teaching methodologies and pedagogy
Practice public speaking and presentation skills
Create lesson plans and course materials
Start teaching (tutoring, workshops, online content)
Get relevant certifications (B.Ed, CELTA, etc.)
Build an online presence (YouTube, Udemy, blog)
Grow your audience and impact
